summary: IB Gateway no longer auto-starts on first launch — you control when to open or install it, with an optional auto-start toggle.
release_notes: IB Gateway no longer launches automatically on first startup. The overlay now shows an 'Open IB Gateway' or 'Install IB Gateway' button instead.
Added an 'Auto-start IB Gateway on launch' checkbox in both the disconnected overlay and Settings → Connection, so you can opt in to automatic startup.
Your auto-start preference is saved and remembered across sessions.
